status: public
shortDescription: "& is only a bitwise AND"
shortCorrection: "& for boolean operands is a logical AND"
concepts:
- Operator
- Boolean
related:
- id: NoShortCircuit
  relation: "&& seen as the one normal logic AND"

    sections: ["15.22.2", "15.23"]

  how: expression involving & on integers
references:
  - citationKey: altadmri37MillionCompilations2015
    id: D
    name: Confusing "short-circuit" evaluators with conventional logical operators
    relationship: "Describes the confusion"
  - citationKey: hristovaIdentifyingCorrectingJava2003

    name: Confusing "short-circuit" evaluators with conventional logical operators
    relationship: "Describes the confusion"

While `&&` is a logical AND, `&` is a bitwise AND.

frontmatter.shortCorrection: & for boolean operands is a logical AND
